justification: The question pertains to the stock price performance and market valuation of a specific publicly traded financial institution.
question:
Will BK's market close price on 2026-03-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
